name: Tabs
import: import { Tabs, TabsList, TabsTrigger, TabsContent } from '@/components/ui/tabs'
description: M3 tabs built on Radix. Active tab uses primary color indicator. Tab items have 48px minimum height for touch target. Label uses title-small (14px/500).
example:
<Tabs defaultValue="general">
  <TabsList className="bg-surface border-b border-outline-variant w-full justify-start rounded-none h-12">
    <TabsTrigger value="general" className="min-h-12 text-[14px] font-medium data-[state=active]:text-primary data-[state=active]:border-b-2 data-[state=active]:border-primary rounded-none">General</TabsTrigger>
    <TabsTrigger value="security" className="min-h-12 text-[14px] font-medium data-[state=active]:text-primary data-[state=active]:border-b-2 data-[state=active]:border-primary rounded-none">Security</TabsTrigger>
    <TabsTrigger value="billing" className="min-h-12 text-[14px] font-medium data-[state=active]:text-primary data-[state=active]:border-b-2 data-[state=active]:border-primary rounded-none">Billing</TabsTrigger>
  </TabsList>
  <TabsContent value="general" className="p-[var(--grid-4)]">General settings content</TabsContent>
  <TabsContent value="security" className="p-[var(--grid-4)]">Security settings content</TabsContent>
  <TabsContent value="billing" className="p-[var(--grid-4)]">Billing settings content</TabsContent>
</Tabs>
never: Never build custom tab systems -- use Tabs from Radix
Never hardcode tab indicator colors -- use primary token
Never make tab items shorter than 48px -- M3 requires minimum touch target height
